content: Integrate, extend, and automate {{organizationName}} {{productName}} using our full suite of developer tools — from REST API and Embed SDK to webhooks and OAuth apps. Choose a tool below to get started.

comment.text: This key provides the introductory description for the Developer Tools section within the Portal Settings. It appears in the page header to inform users about available integration methods and includes placeholders for the organization and product names.

usage.context:
return (
{t("Common:DeveloperTools")} {t("Settings:DeveloperToolsDescription", { organizationName: t("Common:OrganizationName"), productName: t("Common:ProductName") })}
} title={t("Settings:RestAPI")}
